name: Excessive File Deletion and Creation
notes: This rule triggers when a large amount of files are being created and deleted across multiple directories. This could indicate the presence of a ransomware like WCry or Samsam which create an encrypted copy of a file before deleting the original.
bb_references: BB:BehaviorDefinition: File Creation and Deletion match at least 20 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) and different File Directory (custom) in 3 minutes
conditions_text: when BB:BehaviorDefinition: File Creation and Deletion match at least 20 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) and different File Directory (custom) in 3 minutes
thresholds: when BB:BehaviorDefinition: File Creation and Deletion match at least 20 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) and different File Directory (custom) in 3 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Excessive File Deletion and Creation on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when BB:BehaviorDefinition: File Creation and Deletion match at least 20 times with the same Machine Identifier (custom) and different File Directory (custom) in 3 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Excessive File Deletion and Creation
Event description: A large number of files deletion and creation has been detected on the same machine.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
